{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-190", "name": "Integer Overflow or Wraparound"}], "description": "### Impact
The spritefont reader can be induced to perform a 32-bit overflow multiply that could in theory result in a RCE.

This impacts the use of the *DirectX Tool Kit* **SpriteFont** class file loading ctor if given untrusted data files.

> Note this only applies to x86/ARM builds of the library. ARM64 and x64 native is not subject to this issue.

### Patches
This bug has been fixed in the May 7, 2026 release. Alternatively, users can update their copy of the reader as per [this commit](https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXTK/commit/ef1bd5d7f492c39dd0cd87493ba8ea38725c9791).

### Workarounds
This does not apply if a project's .spritefont files are all 'trusted' data that were included with an application. It's primarily an issue only if developers are using user-provided or network downloaded spritefont files.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T15:38:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-18T15:38:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXTK/security/advisories/GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84", "https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXTK/commit/ef1bd5d7f492c39dd0cd87493ba8ea38725c9791", "https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXTK/releases/tag/may2026", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/microsoft/DirectXTK/security-advisories/GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXTK", "summary": "Microsoft DirectX: .spritefont multiply overflow only in 32-bit builds", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T15:38:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c55g-rp4x-fx84", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.5.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "directxtk_desktop_win10"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.1.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2026.5.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "directxtk_uwp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Microsoft DirectX: .spritefont multiply overflow only in 32-bit builds
